title: No Longer Off Limits, the Strait of Hormuz Remains Thorny Politically
summary_full: Even after a cease-fire, Iran is keeping a chokehold on traffic, forcing countries to cut deals that could put them at odds with the U.S.
summary_public: Even after a cease-fire, Iran is keeping a chokehold on traffic, forcing countries to cut deals that could put them at odds with the U.S.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran is keeping a chokehold on traffic
